annotations.title: Example: single calendar day
annotations.text: Replace with your notes. Use locations matching locations.name in Postgres (e.g. site keys from sites.json).

annotations.title: Example: two-day span
annotations.text: Inclusive local calendar days in all_day_timezone.

annotations.title: Example: explicit window
annotations.text: Optional time_end for a shaded region; omit locations to show for any Site selection.
